result.summary: Moesif exposes documented HTTP APIs for event ingestion and management, plus a published npm CLI (`moesif-eth`) for uploading Ethereum ABI artifacts; both use Moesif-issued credentials.
result.description: Moesif is an API analytics, observability, and monetization platform for monitoring API and AI traffic, analyzing usage, and supporting usage-based billing. It provides tooling for ingesting API events and querying or managing analytics and billing data.

moesif_app_id.label: Moesif Application ID
moesif_app_id.setup: Sign in to the [Moesif web app](https://www.moesif.com/wrap) and open the menu link for your application settings / API credentials. The docs state your `Application Id` is used for Collector API ingestion, and the security page distinguishes publishable vs secret application IDs. Use the value as the `X-Moesif-Application-Id` header.

moesif_mgmt_token.label: Moesif Management API token
moesif_mgmt_token.setup: Sign in to the [Moesif web app](https://www.moesif.com/wrap), then go to **Management API** / **API Keys** and create a management token with the minimum scopes you need. The security docs say Management API tokens can be scoped and given an expiration date; the Ethereum CLI README gives an example scope `create:eth_abi`. Use the token for Management API calls or set it in `MOESIF_MANAGEMENT_API_TOKEN` for the CLI.
